stories.headline: US President Trump holds summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing to discuss trade, Taiwan, Hormuz Strait, and Iran.

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: 🇺🇸🇨🇳 The White House issued a statement regarding Trump-Xi talks. - White House called it a "good meeting" - Talks covered expanded economic cooperation and US market access in China - China to increase purchases of American agricultural products - Both sides agree Strait of Hormuz must stay open for global energy - Xi opposed militarization of the Strait; signaled interest in buying more US oil - Joint position: Iran must not obtain a nuclear weapon

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: 6 key takeaways from historic Trump-Xi China summit https://nypost.com/2026/05/15/us-news/trump-xi-china-summit-key-takeaways/?utm_source=twitter&utm_campaign=nypost&utm_medium=social

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: Trump tries to defy gravity with Beijing friendship summit https://www.axios.com/2026/05/15/trump-xi-china-summit?utm_campaign=mrf-utm_campaign=editorial&utm_source=x&utm_medium=owned_social&mrfcid=2026051569fc0e424c77262e8806fa32

stories.headline: US President Donald Trump holds summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing to discuss trade, technology, and global cooperation.

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body:
🚨 LMAO! Leftist media is now melting down because there were no women at the grand meeting table with the TOP BRASS of the world — China and America plus the most powerful CEOs

"Where Are the Women at the Trump-Xi Summit?" — NYT

"Nearly all the business leaders and officials accompanying President Trump in China are men. There are few women on the Chinese side, too."

The NYT is also whining that on Trump's side, the women are in "communications" roles, such as Margo Martin, Monica Crowley and Anna Kelly — all of which are important roles

They will find anything to complain about, pathetic! 🤡

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body:
China abruptly revoked export licenses for more than 400 US beef plants, affecting major processors. The sudden reversal came during the high-profile Trump-Xi summit in Beijing.
https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/insight/china-halts-u-s-beef-licenses-hours-after-renewals-at-trump-xi-summit/gm-GM1C0308E9?gemSnapshotKey=GM1C0308E9-snapshot-16&ocid=fblike

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body:
Republican pundits are all over the board on the Xi-Putin summit.

Most praise Trump for befriending Xi.

But some didn’t get the memo on the new official talking points and still refer to Xi as the enemy and the CCP as an “existential threat “ the US.

stories.headline: White House announces list of prominent business leaders joining President Trump on his state visit to China for the US-China summit.

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Most Americans still think geopolitics is politicians giving speeches at podiums. That’s the old world. What President Trump is doing in Beijing right now is something entirely different: Using CORPORATE POWER as a geopolitical weapon. Look at the delegation he assembled for China: • Elon Musk - Tesla / SpaceX • Tim Cook - Apple ... MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!!! God bless President Trump! God bless America!

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: $NVDA  - TRUMP: CHINA HASN’T BOUGHT NVIDIA H200 CHIPS President Donald Trump said China has not purchased Nvidia’s H200 chips, despite U.S. approval for sales. He said China “chose not to” and is aiming to develop its own technology. Chip stocks fell after the summit ended without a major tech deal.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: President Donald Trump departed Beijing without any immediate sign that the US and China have resolved thorny challenges dogging their fractious relationship, but with a freshly stabilized relationship with Chinese leader Xi Jinping – for now.

stories.headline: President Trump concludes summit with Chinese President Xi Jinping in Beijing, announcing significant new trade deals worth over $1 trillion.

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: Every American should be proud of President Trump’s historic and consequential trip to China. Glad we finally have a leader who fights for American interests across the globe.

stories.headline: US 30-Year Treasury Yield surges to 5.12%, the highest level since the lead-up to the Global Financial Crisis.

perspectives.label: Conservative
perspectives.body: The yield on the 30-year Treasury is now 5.1%, the highest since 2007. The 10-year Treasury yield is 4.55%, the highest since the Liberation Day selloff. This may set off a major bond market collapse that will send yields soaring unless the Fed sends inflation soaring instead.

perspectives.label: Independent
perspectives.body: ‼️US government bond SELL-OFF is accelerating: The 30-year Treasury yield is up to 5.09%, the 3rd-highest level since the Great Financial Crisis. It is just 8 basis points away from its 19-year high. US public debt is becoming more expensive.

perspectives.label: Democrat
perspectives.body: The 30-year Treasury yield is at its highest level since June 2007

stories.headline: Markets now show over 50% chance of Fed rate hike by January 2027 due to shifting odds.
stories.body:
RATE HIKE BETS SURGE IN MARKETS

US interest rate futures now show more than a 50% chance of a Fed rate hike by January, according to Kalshi pricing.

Markets have shifted sharply from near-zero odds to actively pricing in tightening risk as early as 2026, with a 34% probability of a hike before 2027.

stories.headline: Joe Rogan voices concern over Theo Von's mental health struggles and SSRI medication effects on his podcast.
stories.body:
Joe Rogan just took time out of his podcast to express genuine concern for his friend Theo Von.

He admitted that some of Von’s recent behavior after getting on SSRIs “freaks me out” — especially his comments about suicide.

ROGAN: “Theo Von’s going through the exact same thing and last time he was on the podcast he was explaining it to me.”

“It freaks me out because I know Theo has had conversations before...like even publicly.”

“He had a Netflix taping and it didn’t go well. It was like they actually never...they shelved it. They never used it.”

“And you know there was all these stories from people that were there saying he bombed. I think he just had a kind of a breakdown.”

“And when he was talking to the crowd and there’s a video of it, he said, you know, the people were saying, hey, we still love you.”

“He goes, thank you. Look, I’m just I’m trying not to take my own life.”

“And like you hear stuff like that and you just go like, oh, Jesus Christ.”

“I’ve known too many people that I didn’t think were going to kill themselves and then did.”

“And then he goes down these spirals where he starts talking about world events and freaking out. I’m like, oh, Jesus Christ! Like, I got to help this dude.”

stories.headline: NASA's Psyche mission is approaching Mars for a trajectory adjustment.
stories.body:
Right now, NASA's #MissionToPsyche is approaching Mars. 

Current distance: 29,780 miles
Current speed relative to Mars: 10,340 mph

This simulated view, based on actual trajectory data, comes from our Eyes on the Solar System experience. 

Ride along: http://eyes.nasa.gov/apps/solar-system/#/sc_psyche

stories.headline: Newport Beach operates 16 oil wells generating over $1.2 million annually while California pushes to eliminate fossil fuels.
stories.body:
The City of Newport Beach in California owns 16 oil wells

They produce over 21,000 barrels per year. The city makes about $1.2 million per year f

California says we have to get rid of fossil fuels to fight change change, but California cities are profiting from oil production

Ironically the city of Newport has opposed new offshore drilling but keeps pumping from their own wells and making money

The hypocrisy of Democrats never ends
